name: Skill Stats tab shows per-skill usage metrics
description: From the Skills Lab, open the seeded `pr-quality-rubric` skill and switch to its Stats tab. Confirms the tab routes (tab=stats) and renders the seeded usage metrics: the 'Used by' KPI, the agents-using panel with a seeded agent (Performance Reviewer) + its Open link, and a finding category in the donut legend. Exercises the new GET /skills/:id/stats endpoint + StatsTab component end-to-end against freshly-seeded data (the seed attributes PR #501's categorized findings to the rubric's agents). NOTE: assertions avoid the SectionLabel panel headings ('Agents using this skill', 'Findings by category') because agent-browser matches CSS-rendered text and those labels are text-transform:uppercase — match case-stable content instead. Assumes a freshly-seeded DB — guaranteed by e2e-web.yml; run locally via the hermetic stack (see e2e/README.md).

steps.label: filter the list to the target so its card is the only one and in view (the row sits below the fold otherwise, and clicking an off-screen card does not register the navigation in CI)
client-side navigation to the skill editor route lands
the skill editor mounts and its fetch settles (avoids racing the tab render in CI)
stats tab is active in the URL
the agents-using panel lists a seeded agent that uses the skill
each agent row exposes an Open link
the findings-by-category donut legend renders a category
